# Shuffle Security

> Open source alert and case management for security teams. Frontend for the Shuffle Core API with AI agents, OCSF-aligned incidents, detections, and 3,000+ integrations.

Shuffle Security consolidates alerts and cases as Incidents (OCSF 2005), runs AI agents for triage and response, and integrates with the Shuffle automation platform.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and entry point.
- [Apps](/apps): Catalog of 3,000+ security integrations.
- [Shuffle MCP demo](/shuffle-mcp-demo): Live MCP server demo.
- [Docs](/docs): Documentation index.
- [Getting started](/docs/getting-started): Initial setup guide.
- [Setup](/docs/setup): Configuration reference.

## Product

- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Overview and setup guide.
- [Incidents](/incidents): OCSF 2005 incident management.
- [Alerts](/alerts): Raw alert stream.
- [Cases](/cases): Investigation cases.
- [Tickets](/tickets): Ticket queue.
- [Jobs](/jobs): Background job runs.
- [Templates](/templates): Reusable response templates.
- [Agent](/agent): AI agent activity and approvals.
- [Infrastructure](/infrastructure): Workflow and automation infrastructure.
- [Usecases](/usecases): Pre-built security use cases.

## Detection

- [Detection](/detection): Detection overview.
- [Sigma rules](/detection/sigma): Sigma rule editor and AI generation.
- [Pipelines](/detection/pipelines): Tenzir detection pipelines.
- [MITRE ATT&CK](/detection/mitre): MITRE coverage dashboard.
- [IOC types](/detection/ioc-types): IOC type configuration.
- [Threat feeds](/detection/threat-feeds): MISP and threat feed sources.

## Assets

- [Monitors](/monitors): Host monitors and sensors.
- [Assets](/assets): OCSF 6002 asset inventory.
- [Vulnerabilities](/vulnerabilities): Vulnerability management.

## Optional

- [Login](/login): Sign in.
- [Register](/register): Create an account.
- [Onboarding](/onboarding): First-run setup wizard.
- [Settings](/settings): Account settings.
- [Preferences](/preferences): Workspace preferences.
- [Organizations](/organizations): Organization management.
- [Users](/users): User administration.
